biological_replicate: 122 HCC tissues and paired 111 adjacent normal tissues
Two human HCC tissue microarrays contained 122 HCC tissues, and paired 111 adjacent normal tissues were obtained from OUTDO Biotech.
experimental_design: To investigate the effect of PC4 on radiosensitivity, we stably knocked down PC4 in Huh7 and HepG2 cells by lentiviral transfection.
factor_value: PC4 is a DNA repair driver that can be targeted to radiosensitize HCC cells.
